name: Obsolete Feature in UI
description: A UI function is obsolete and the product does not warn the user. The user may rely on a deprecated or non-functional feature without knowing it no longer provides the expected security or functionality, leading to quality degradation and potential security gaps.
detection_pattern: EGRESS node (UI element) exposes an obsolete feature without a META or CONTROL node that flags it as deprecated or warns the user. Look for STRUCTURAL UI components that reference functionality no longer supported by backend CONTROL or TRANSFORM nodes.
